zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Leigh於1384年9月26日出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Robert de Legh III23歲，母親Isabel De Belgrave-2歲。她於大約1400年與Ralph Davenport在英國爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Leigh于1384年9月26日出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Legh III23岁，母亲Isabel De Belgrave-2岁。她于大约1400年与Ralph Davenport在英国爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Leigh was born on 26 September 1384, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Legh III, was 23 and her mother, Isabel De Belgrave, was -2. She married Ralph Davenport about 1400, in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1428, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Leigh est née le 26 septembre 1384, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Belgrave, avait -2 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Davenport environ 1400, à Thurstaston, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1428, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Leigh am 26. September 1384 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Legh III 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel De Belgrave -2. Sie hat um 1400 in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England Ralph Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1428 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Leigh è nata il il 26 settembre 1384 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Legh III, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel De Belgrave, aveva -2 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Davenport circa 1400, nel Thurstaston, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1428, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Leighが1384年9月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh IIIは23歳，母Isabel De Belgraveは-2歳であった。約1400年にイギリスチェシュアイアスウルスタストンでRalph Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Leigh(이)가 1384년 9월 26일 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Legh III(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel De Belgrave(은)는 -2세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 체실르 스르스타스턴에서 Ralph Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Leigh nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1384, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Belgrave, tinha -2 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Davenport aproximadamente 1400, em Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1428, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Leigh родилась 26 сентября 1384 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Legh III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Belgrave, -2. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Davenport около 1400 г. в местности турстастон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1428 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Leigh nació el 26 de septiembre de 1384, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel De Belgrave, tenía -2 años. Se casó con Ralph Davenport aproximadamente 1400, en Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1428, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
